name: Aromatic Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the coarse outer leaves from the cabbage and cut it into quarters. Core and shred the cabbage fine. Set aside.
2. Peel the onions and cut them in half lengthwise. Cut each half crosswise into thin rings. Set aside.
3. Heat oil in a large wok or wide pot over medium heat until very hot.
4. Add cumin seeds and fennel seeds to the hot oil. Stir for a few minutes until they turn slightly darker.
5. Toss in sesame seeds and stir briefly before adding onions.
6. Stir-fry onions for 2-3 minutes, or until browned on the edges.
7. Cover tightly and reduce heat to low. Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until cabbage wilts.
8. Uncover and increase heat to high. Continue stir-frying vegetables for an additional 5 minutes, or until they are very tender.
SERVES: 6
